spec_match.rationale: Builds the full attribution_scopes.{values,limit,max_event_states} object with spec-correct validation for effective-set size, scope_limit, max_event_states, 50-character source scopes, and duplicate collapse.

interactive.rationale: Live editable scope list, numeric bounds, JSON output, live validation list, copy-to-clipboard, trigger match preview — full builder.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Feature and page blurbs now promise the corrected validation set and multi-scope trigger preview — page delivers.

edge_cases.rationale: Covers empty values, over-limit effective sets, scope_limit below the effective count, max_event_states bounds, duplicate collapse, source scope values over 50 characters, omitted trigger scopes, and multi-scope any-overlap triggers.

references.rationale: See-also section now includes the required ChromeStatus entry plus the Attribution Reporting spec and Privacy Sandbox guide.

design_system.rationale: All variables, copy-btn sets background AND color together, meter accents (emerald/amber/rose) all WCAG-compatible on stone backgrounds.

summary: The builder now validates the source-side contracts from the current Attribution Reporting spec, explains that there is no character whitelist beyond string length, previews trigger.attribution_scopes as an array with set-intersection matching, includes the required references, and exposes a copyable rejected-header sample when validation fails.
